highlights.title: LME copper prices fall as escalating US-Iran war renews inflation risks, interest rate hike fears
Gold price drops 1%, silver rates crash over 2% on MCX as inflation fears, rate hike concerns revive
JSW Infrastructure among 7 stocks that hit 52-week highs and rallied up to 30% in a month
Oil pangs resurface for rupee, options market gauge signals bearish bias
